goal: Advance structured-family live preview and active-config pilot readiness together, following live evidence.

familyStatus.hl.animation: LivePreviewSupportedWithDeadMan (modify-existing scope) - live proof passed: global node speed 8.00 -> 8.5 -> 8.00, readback-verified, zero residue
familyStatus.hl.curve: LivePreviewSupportedWithDeadMan (modify-existing scope) - live proof passed: default bezier (0, 0.75, 0.15, 1) -> y0 0.76 -> restored exactly, readback-verified, zero residue
familyStatus.hl.gesture: BlockedNoVerificationMechanism - runtime API exists but no record readback and no touch hardware
familyStatus.hl.monitor: BlockedHighRisk - needs a blind display recovery system
familyStatus.hl.bind: BlockedHighRisk - needs a proven unbind round trip plus input fallback model
familyStatus.hl.device: BlockedHighRisk - a wrong record can disable the confirming device
familyStatus.hl.permission: BlockedHighRisk - security policy is never live previewed

keyEvidence: all seven families have runtime record APIs in the Lua config manager, discovered via mutation-free invalid-argument probes: hl.animation, hl.curve, hl.gesture, hl.bind, hl.device, hl.permission, hl.monitor
hyprctl animations provides full read-only readback for animation leaves and bezier curves - the verification mechanism for the two promoted families
record creation can never be exactly reverted (no deletion; no revert-to-inherit; enabled is mandatory on hl.animation), so promotion is scoped to modify-existing records only
hl.config animation/bezier keys are silently ignored or rejected - readback verification is mandatory because ok responses can be no-ops
hl.curve takes a { type, points } table (schema revealed by safe probe error, then proven live)
autoreloadEvidence: read-only getoption misc:disable_autoreload returned bool: false during this marathon; the ignored pilot test now requires BOTH the operator env flag AND live-collected evidence
copiedActiveConfigRehearsalStatus: proven (prior sprint) and re-verified at every pilot preflight via content-hash freshness
activeConfigBackupPath: not created - pilot never reached the backup step
uiSurfaces: Config page 'Structured-family live preview & persistence' card with per-family capability, status, and blocked reason
autoreload blocker explanation with the exact unblock instructions (set misc:disable_autoreload = true, or approve the one reload)
insensitive supervised-family-preview control (no live family controls exist yet)
sourceGuards: the family preview module contains no command construction, no config writes, no reload path
the live harness is ignored, env-gated, and touches only the two proven records; monitor/bind/device/permission/gesture never appear in it
families are promoted only via PROVEN_FAMILY_RECORD_PROOFS receipts scoped to modify-existing (test-enforced)
UI builds no family runtime commands (no hl.animation(/hl.curve(/hl.config in UI code)
the pilot fails closed on false or missing autoreload evidence, and the operator flag alone cannot open the gate
testsAdded: structured_family_modify_existing_round_trips (ignored, env-gated; run this marathon: both families passed)
filesChanged: plus continuation/handoff/status report and doc updates
nextRecommendedWork: Wire supervised UI controls for the two proven families (modify-existing animation/curve records through a family dead-man panel); the active-config pilot decision remains the user's.
followUp: Safe Live Save Mode sprint: pilot PASSED via runtime-first autoreload control; supervised family preview UI controls implemented for the two proven records
